---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you're proposing.

## Motivation

Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Crate(s) Affected

Which ZeroPoint crate or crates does this relate to?
(e.g., zp-policy, zp-transport, zp-attestation)

## Relation to the Four Tenets

Does this feature relate to any of ZeroPoint's foundational principles?
- Do No Harm
- Respect Sovereignty
- Integrity First
- Transparency

How does it strengthen or relate to these principles?

## Proposed Implementation (Optional)

If you have a rough idea of how this could be implemented, describe it here.

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help:
- Similar features in other projects
- Examples or use cases
- Related issues or discussions
